steps.text: Can you spot red on the colour wheel?
steps.feedback: Warm and bright! Now find yellow!
Bright as sunshine! Nearly there — find orange!
That's what red and yellow make together!

steps.text: Can you find blue on the colour wheel?
steps.feedback: Cool and calm! Now find yellow!
Bright! Now find the colour they make together.
Blue and yellow make green!

steps.text: Find red on the colour wheel.
steps.feedback: Got it! Now find blue.
Now find the colour they make together.
Red and blue make purple!

steps.text: Find red — it's a primary colour.
steps.feedback: Primary colour number one! Now find yellow.
Primary colour number two! Now find blue.
Primary colour number three — you found them all!

steps.text: Find orange — made from red and yellow!
steps.feedback: Secondary colour number one! Now find green.
Secondary colour number two! Now find purple.
Secondary colour number three — all three secondaries!
Warm like fire! Now find orange.
Warm like the setting sun! Now find yellow.
Warm like sunshine — all three warm colours found!

steps.text: Find blue — cool like the ocean.
steps.feedback: Cool like the sea! Now find green.
Cool like leaves and grass! Now find purple.
Cool and mysterious — all three cool colours!
Got it! Now find green.
Now find the colour they make — teal!
Blue and green make teal!
Got it! Now find orange.
Now find the colour they make — Vermillion!
Red and orange make Vermillion!

steps.text: Find yellow on the colour wheel.
steps.feedback: Bright as sunshine! Now find orange.
Now find the colour they make — Amber!
Yellow and orange make Amber!

steps.text: Find yellow on the colour wheel.
steps.feedback: Got it! Now find green.
Now find the colour they make — Chartreuse!
Yellow and green make Chartreuse!

steps.text: Find blue on the colour wheel.
steps.feedback: Cool and calm! Now find purple.
Now find the colour they make — Indigo!
Blue and purple make Indigo!

steps.text: Find red on the colour wheel.
steps.feedback: Got it! Now find purple.
Now find the colour they make — Magenta!
Red and purple make Magenta!
